mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP expands corporate earnings expectations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in positive GDP growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 8.0% signals labor market stabilization, reducing recession risk premiums and driving positive equity returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative in more than 50% of instances where UNRATE drops below 8.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous low federal funds rates and stable consumer price inflation compress real discount rates while preserving purchasing power, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns show no significant difference when both conditions hold versus when only one holds in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and aggregate supply, which supports corporate margins and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO prints consistently precede negative 5d SPX returns across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in housing starts exceeding 50.0 thousand units signals strong consumer confidence and construction activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST jumps above the threshold are followed by negative SPX 20d returns in more than 40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands household income and consumption, supporting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Positive payroll growth months are not associated with higher 60d forward returns than negative payroll months in walk-forward analysis.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with increasing housing starts reflect broad-based consumer demand expansion, which boosts corporate revenue forecasts and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict returns better than either proxy alone in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate remains below 0.5%, accommodative monetary policy sustains liquidity inflows into equities, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are flat or negative when FEDFUNDS stays below 0.5% for consecutive quarters.
